title: Jason Qiu | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Immigration Attorney
Request A Consultation
Jason Qiu is an experienced Immigration Attorney who specializes in business immigration matters. He is a graduate of Washington University School of Law and is a member of several legal associations, including the Chicago Bar Association, Illinois State Bar Association, and American Immigration Lawyers Association.
Mr. Qiu has extensive experience representing clients in a range of immigration matters, including EB-1A, EB-1B, EB-2 National Interest Waiver, and O-1A cases. He has a proven track record of successfully responding to Requests for Evidence and Notices of Intent to Deny/Revoke. With a deep understanding of the nuances of the U.S. immigration system, Jason Qiu is committed to helping his clients navigate the complexities of the process.
In addition to his immigration expertise, Mr. Qiu also has experience in intellectual property law and business litigation. His broad legal knowledge allows him to provide comprehensive advice to his clients and develop innovative legal solutions tailored to their unique needs. In his spare time, Jason Qiu enjoys rock climbing and live music and he is also an avid St. Louis Cardinals fan.
